TIAMATBEAST-TIAMAT_FEMME_FATALE_POWER.de: #Humanoid form, the brood-mother. At the start of your turn: gain 1 Nurture. Build the swarm cheaply here, then cash it in as the Beast.
TIAMATBEAST-TIAMAT_FEMME_FATALE_POWER.sm: #Humanoid form, the brood-mother. At the start of your turn: gain 1 Nurture. Build the swarm cheaply here, then cash it in as the Beast.
TIAMATBEAST-TIAMAT_BEAST_POWER.title: Draconic Form
TIAMATBEAST-TIAMAT_BEAST_POWER.descripti: #Beast II form, the devourer. Your cards apply 1 more Curse, and at the start of your turn you apply 1 Curse to an enemy on your own. The climax form, entered through the Genesis window.
TIAMATBEAST-TIAMAT_BEAST_POWER.smartDesc: #Beast II form, the devourer. Your cards apply 1 more Curse, and at the start of your turn you apply 1 Curse to an enemy on your own. The climax form, entered through the Genesis window.
TIAMATBEAST-GENESIS_SPENT_POWER.title: Genesis Spent
TIAMATBEAST-GENESIS_SPENT_POWER.descript: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and Genesis already triggered. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
TIAMATBEAST-GENESIS_SPENT_POWER.smartDes: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and Genesis already triggered. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
TIAMATBEAST-MOTHER_GUTS_POWER.title: Mother's Guts
TIAMATBEAST-MOTHER_GUTS_POWER.descriptio: #The first time you would die this combat, revive at 1 HP and spawn 3 Laḫmu.
TIAMATBEAST-MOTHER_GUTS_POWER.smartDescr: #The first time you would die this combat, revive at 1 HP and spawn 3 Laḫmu.
